definition:
ἀπό-κριμα, -τος, τό
 (ἀποκρίνω); 
  1. prop., a judicial sentence: 2Co.1:9, R, mg. 
   2. an answer (see Thayer, see word): 2Co.1:9, R, txt. (In FlJ, Ant., xiv, 10, 6, of a rescript of the Senate; in Inscr. of an official decision, Deiss., BS, 257; a reply to a deputation, MM, see word: cf. also Cremer, 3'75).†
 (AS)
